det_check_template:
proof fn det_thread_set_current_cpu(thread_ptr: ThreadPtr, pre_thread_perm: Tracked<PointsTo<Thread>>, cpu_id: Option<CpuId>, post1_thread_perm: Tracked<PointsTo<Thread>>, r1: (), post2_thread_perm: Tracked<PointsTo<Thread>>, r2: ())
    requires (pre_thread_perm@.is_init()), (pre_thread_perm@.addr() == thread_ptr),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (post1_thread_perm@.is_init())
            &&& (post1_thread_perm@.addr() == thread_ptr)
            &&& (post1_thread_perm@.value().owning_container == pre_thread_perm@.value().owning_container)
            &&& (post1_thread_perm@.value().owning_proc == pre_thread_perm@.value().owning_proc)
            &&& (post1_thread_perm@.value().state == pre_thread_perm@.value().state)
            &&& (post1_thread_perm@.value().proc_rev_ptr == pre_thread_perm@.value().proc_rev_ptr)
            &&& (post1_thread_perm@.value().scheduler_rev_ptr == pre_thread_perm@.value().scheduler_rev_ptr)
            &&& (post1_thread_perm@.value().blocking_endpoint_ptr == pre_thread_perm@.value().blocking_endpoint_ptr)
            &&& (post1_thread_perm@.value().endpoint_rev_ptr == pre_thread_perm@.value().endpoint_rev_ptr)
            &&& (post1_thread_perm@.value().running_cpu == cpu_id)
            &&& (post1_thread_perm@.value().endpoint_descriptors == pre_thread_perm@.value().endpoint_descriptors)
            &&& (post1_thread_perm@.value().ipc_payload == pre_thread_perm@.value().ipc_payload)
            &&& (post1_thread_perm@.value().error_code == pre_thread_perm@.value().error_code)
            &&& (post1_thread_perm@.value().trap_frame == pre_thread_perm@.value().trap_frame)
            &&& (post2_thread_perm@.is_init())
            &&& (post2_thread_perm@.addr() == thread_ptr)
            &&& (post2_thread_perm@.value().owning_container == pre_thread_perm@.value().owning_container)
            &&& (post2_thread_perm@.value().owning_proc == pre_thread_perm@.value().owning_proc)
            &&& (post2_thread_perm@.value().state == pre_thread_perm@.value().state)
            &&& (post2_thread_perm@.value().proc_rev_ptr == pre_thread_perm@.value().proc_rev_ptr)
            &&& (post2_thread_perm@.value().scheduler_rev_ptr == pre_thread_perm@.value().scheduler_rev_ptr)
            &&& (post2_thread_perm@.value().blocking_endpoint_ptr == pre_thread_perm@.value().blocking_endpoint_ptr)
            &&& (post2_thread_perm@.value().endpoint_rev_ptr == pre_thread_perm@.value().endpoint_rev_ptr)
            &&& (post2_thread_perm@.value().running_cpu == cpu_id)
            &&& (post2_thread_perm@.value().endpoint_descriptors == pre_thread_perm@.value().endpoint_descriptors)
            &&& (post2_thread_perm@.value().ipc_payload == pre_thread_perm@.value().ipc_payload)
            &&& (post2_thread_perm@.value().error_code == pre_thread_perm@.value().error_code)
            &&& (post2_thread_perm@.value().trap_frame == pre_thread_perm@.value().trap_frame)
        }) ==> det_thread_set_current_cpu_equal(r1, r2, post1_thread_perm, post2_thread_perm),
{
{ASSUMES}}
